name: forge
description: Codebase-aware specification engine. V3 flow-reversal mode (plugin v4.0.0): brownfield runs use flow-mapper + node-by-node flow-interviewer to produce grounded flow deltas instead of end-state specs. v4.1.0: R2 now asks the user to explicitly confirm the entrypoint (flow-graph node where new work attaches) before sketching hops — eliminating Claude's guessed-origin failure mode. Forge plans. Foundry builds.
